required_paths: connect startup hello auth challenge auth success auth failure capability negotiation
normalization_rules: normalize timestamps random nonces connection ids handles salts and redacted secrets
negative_cases: malformed startup unsupported version failed auth hidden principal no-disclosure

required_paths: prepare bind describe execute fetch stream cancel close error completion
normalization_rules: normalize statement handles cursor ids batch ordering server timing transaction ids and result chunk boundaries
negative_cases: malformed frame stale handle unauthorized descriptor mismatch cancellation race resource timeout

required_paths: donor-shaped errors warnings notices progress and status outputs
normalization_rules: normalize ordering where donor permits nondeterminism and redact protected fields
negative_cases: security denial hidden object unsupported feature resource limit and parser recovery diagnostics
